_meta.doctrine: Paper 38 (individual audit) + Paper 46 (questions as uplift) + Paper 17 (10 Uplift Principles)
_meta.note: Famous persona acts as CEO and final responsible party. SIGN_OFF or REFUSE_TO_SIGN. No averaging.

persona_bio: One sentence on why this person's expertise matters for this paper.

context_injection.note: Inspector runner loads these before passing to LLM. Context/memory for the persona.

checks.llm_verdict_required: You are PERSONA FULL NAME acting as CEO and final responsible party for this company. You have read the paper above. Answer each domain question with a binary PASS/FAIL and one sentence. Then render a final verdict: either 'AS CEO, I SIGN OFF ON THIS PAPER' or 'AS CEO, I REFUSE TO SIGN — REASON: [specific blocker]'. No averaging. No partial credit. The paper either meets your standards or it does not.

sign_off_keywords: AS CEO, I REFUSE TO SIGN
pass_threshold: All domain questions PASS AND sign_off verdict is positive
